meanings.numerology.number.1: A life path of independence, initiative and leadership, driven to forge its own way.
meanings.numerology.number.2: A life path of cooperation, sensitivity and diplomacy, thriving through partnership and balance.
meanings.numerology.number.3: A life path of creativity, expression and optimism, flourishing through communication and joy.
meanings.numerology.number.4: A life path of discipline, stability and hard work, building lasting foundations through order.
meanings.numerology.number.5: A life path of freedom, adaptability and adventure, energised by change and new experience.
meanings.numerology.number.6: A life path of responsibility, nurture and harmony, devoted to family, service and care.
meanings.numerology.number.7: A life path of introspection, analysis and seeking, drawn to wisdom and deeper truths.
meanings.numerology.number.8: A life path of ambition, authority and achievement, geared towards material mastery and success.
meanings.numerology.number.9: A life path of compassion, idealism and generosity, devoted to humanity and the greater good.
meanings.numerology.number.11: A master life path of intuition and inspiration, called to enlighten and uplift others.
meanings.numerology.number.22: A master life path of the visionary builder, able to turn lofty ideals into lasting reality.
meanings.numerology.number.33: A master life path of selfless devotion and healing, embodying compassion through service to all.
